category.scope_note: LED luminaire and LED lamp compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the India market.

title.en: China-to-India LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入印度：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入印度：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against India BIS Compulsory Registration Scheme requirements for IS 10322 luminaires and IS 16102 LED lamps, BEE star labelling for LED lamps, and EMC requirements based on Indian Standards and CISPR references.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与印度 BIS 强制注册计划下 IS 10322 灯具、IS 16102 LED 灯、BEE LED 能效星级标识以及基于印度标准和 CISPR 参考的 EMC 要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與印度 BIS 強制註冊計劃下 IS 10322 燈具、IS 16102 LED 燈、BEE LED 能效星級標識以及基於印度標準和 CISPR 參考的 EMC 要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BIS registration approval, BEE registration approval, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current BIS CRS notifications, MeitY Electronics and IT Goods Orders, Indian Standards, BEE schedules, labelling rules, and EMC requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BIS 注册批准、BEE 注册批准、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行 BIS CRS 通知、MeitY 电子与信息技术产品命令、印度标准、BEE 附表、标签规则及 EMC 要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BIS 註冊批准、BEE 註冊批准、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行 BIS CRS 通知、MeitY 電子與資訊技術產品命令、印度標準、BEE 附表、標籤規則及 EMC 要求。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire or LED lamp manufacturer entering India must first confirm whether the exact product is notified under the Electronics and IT Goods (Requirements for Compulsory Registration) framework administered through BIS CRS. Notified LED luminaires are commonly assessed against IS 10322 series requirements and notified self-ballasted LED lamps against IS 16102 series requirements; CRS registration and Standard Mark use are required before sale for in-scope goods. BEE star labelling may also apply to LED lamps under the Bureau of Energy Efficiency programme. EMC evidence should be checked against applicable Indian Standards and CISPR-based lighting EMC references. Indian Standards should be treated as voluntary technical routes that may support presumption or evidence of conformity; the binding obligation comes from the Act, Rules, Orders, and official notifications.
answer_first.zh: 中国 LED 灯具或 LED 灯制造商进入印度前，须先确认具体产品是否被纳入通过 BIS CRS 管理的《电子与信息技术产品强制注册要求》框架。被通知的 LED 灯具通常按 IS 10322 系列要求评估，被通知的自镇流 LED 灯通常按 IS 16102 系列要求评估；适用产品销售前须取得 CRS 注册并使用标准标志。LED 灯还可能适用印度能效局 BEE 星级标识计划。EMC 证据应按适用印度标准及基于 CISPR 的照明 EMC 参考进行核查。印度标准应作为可支持符合性推定或证据的自愿技术路径；具有约束力的义务来自法律、规则、命令及官方通知。
answer_first.zht: 中國 LED 燈具或 LED 燈製造商進入印度前，須先確認具體產品是否被納入通過 BIS CRS 管理的《電子與資訊技術產品強制註冊要求》框架。被通知的 LED 燈具通常按 IS 10322 系列要求評估，被通知的自鎮流 LED 燈通常按 IS 16102 系列要求評估；適用產品銷售前須取得 CRS 註冊並使用標準標誌。LED 燈還可能適用印度能效局 BEE 星級標識計劃。EMC 證據應按適用印度標準及基於 CISPR 的照明 EMC 參考進行核查。印度標準應作為可支持符合性推定或證據的自願技術路徑；具有約束力的義務來自法律、規則、命令及官方通知。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official India regulator, statutory order, BIS, BEE, MeitY, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. BIS CRS product scope, BEE LED lamp schedules, Indian Standard references, and EMC clauses must be re-verified against current official notifications on each review cycle.

q.en: Is BIS CRS registration mandatory for LED lamps and luminaires in India?
q.zh: 在印度，LED灯泡和灯具是否须强制进行BIS CRS登记？
q.zht: 在印度，LED燈泡和燈具是否須強制進行BIS CRS登記？

a.en: Yes. LED lamps are covered under BIS Compulsory Registration Scheme (CRS) per IS 16102 (LED lamps for general lighting), and luminaires under IS 10322. BIS CRS registration is mandatory before import or sale, and the BIS registration number must appear on the product and packaging.
a.zh: 是的。LED灯泡按IS 16102（通用照明LED灯泡）受BIS强制注册计划（CRS）覆盖，灯具按IS 10322受管。BIS CRS登记是进口或销售前的强制要求，BIS注册号须标注在产品和包装上。
a.zht: 是的。LED燈泡按IS 16102（通用照明LED燈泡）受BIS強制注冊計劃（CRS）覆蓋，燈具按IS 10322受管。BIS CRS登記是進口或銷售前的強制要求，BIS注冊號須標注在產品和包裝上。

q.en: Is BEE Star labelling required for LED lamps sold in India?
q.zh: 在印度销售的LED灯泡是否须贴BEE星级标签？
q.zht: 在印度銷售的LED燈泡是否須貼BEE星級標籤？

a.en: BEE Star labelling for LED lamps is mandatory under the Bureau of Energy Efficiency's programme for covered wattages. The star rating is based on lumen efficacy (lm/W) testing, and products must display the star label before sale. BIS CRS registration is a separate parallel requirement.
a.zh: 在BEE计划覆盖瓦数范围内，LED灯泡的BEE星级标签属强制要求。星级基于光效（lm/W）测试，产品须在销售前标注星级标签。BIS CRS登记是独立的并行要求。
a.zht: 在BEE計劃覆蓋瓦數範圍內，LED燈泡的BEE星級標籤屬強制要求。星級基於光效（lm/W）測試，產品須在銷售前標注星級標籤。BIS CRS登記是獨立的並行要求。
